__NOTOC__
[[Category:Features]]
Lead paragraph.
==Overview==
Body paragraph.

{{Infobox
| name=Feature page
| image = [[File:Feature.png|thumb]]
| caption = [[Unsafe|caption]]
| 中文=测试
}}

[[File:Feature.png|thumb|right|300px|alt=Feature]]   

[[en:Feature page]]
[[zh-hant:功能頁面]]
{{DEFAULTSORT:Feature Page}}
